allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./src/config/db.js'\).then\(\({default: db}\) => { const rows = db.prepare\('SELECT id, hoi_vien_id, pt_id, trang_thai FROM dang_ky_pt'\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/config/db.js'\).then\(\({default: db}\) => { const rows = db.prepare\('SELECT id, hoi_vien_id, dang_ky_pt_id FROM lich_tap ORDER BY id'\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/config/db.js'\).then\(\({default: db}\) => { const info = db.prepare\('PRAGMA table_info\(dang_ky_pt\)'\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(info.map\(c => \({name: c.name, dflt_value: c.dflt_value}\)\), null, 2\)\); }\)")
